question_pattern: What is the core technology stack?
approved_answer: Northstar Analytics platform is built on React frontend | PostgreSQL database | Apache Spark processing | and deployed on Microsoft Azure cloud infrastructure.

question_pattern: How many concurrent users does the platform support?
approved_answer: The platform supports up to 10000 concurrent users per tenant with horizontal auto-scaling. Performance SLAs are maintained at P95 latency under 500ms.

question_pattern: Is the platform SOC 2 certified?
approved_answer: Yes. Northstar Analytics maintains SOC 2 Type II certification. Our most recent audit was completed in June 2024 by Deloitte with zero exceptions noted.

question_pattern: How is data encrypted?
approved_answer: All data is encrypted at rest using AES-256 and in transit using TLS 1.3. Database field-level encryption is available for sensitive data elements.

question_pattern: Do you conduct penetration testing?
approved_answer: Yes. We engage an independent third-party firm to conduct annual penetration testing. Critical and high findings are remediated within 30 days. Reports are available under NDA.

question_pattern: How do you handle data subject access requests?
approved_answer: Our platform includes a data subject request workflow that enables clients to fulfill access | correction | and deletion requests within the required timeframes. Clients retain control over the DSAR process.

question_pattern: What is your data retention policy?
approved_answer: Data is retained for the duration of the client contract plus 90 days. Clients may configure shorter retention periods. Upon contract termination all client data is securely deleted within 90 days with certification provided.

question_pattern: What is the typical implementation timeline?
approved_answer: Standard implementations range from 12-20 weeks depending on scope and complexity. Factors include number of data integrations | user count | and customization requirements.

question_pattern: What methodology do you use for implementation?
approved_answer: We follow an agile implementation methodology with 2-week sprints | regular stakeholder demos | and iterative delivery. Each phase has defined acceptance criteria and gate reviews.

question_pattern: What are your standard SLA response times?
approved_answer: Severity 1 (system down): 1-hour response | 4-hour resolution target. Severity 2: 4-hour response. Severity 3: 1 business day. Severity 4: 3 business days. 24/7 support for Sev 1 and 2.

question_pattern: What support channels are available?
approved_answer: We offer 24/7 phone and email support for critical issues | business hours support for standard issues | an online self-service portal | and a dedicated Customer Success Manager for enterprise accounts.

question_pattern: Do you sign BAAs for HIPAA compliance?
approved_answer: Yes. We execute Business Associate Agreements for clients subject to HIPAA. Our BAA template has been reviewed by outside counsel and is available for review during contract negotiations.

question_pattern: What is your limitation of liability?
approved_answer: Our standard limitation of liability is capped at 12 months of fees paid. Exceptions require approval from General Counsel and are evaluated on a case-by-case basis.

question_pattern: What is the pricing model?
approved_answer: We offer subscription-based pricing with annual or multi-year terms. Pricing is based on the number of named users and the modules selected. Volume discounts are available for commitments above 500 users.

question_pattern: Are there implementation fees?
approved_answer: Yes. Implementation fees are based on project scope and typically range from $75K to $300K depending on the number of integrations | institutions | and customization requirements.

question_pattern: Is the platform WCAG compliant?
approved_answer: Our platform conforms to WCAG 2.1 Level AA standards. A current VPAT (Voluntary Product Accessibility Template) is available upon request.

question_pattern: Do you support single sign-on?
approved_answer: Yes. We support SAML 2.0 and OAuth 2.0 / OpenID Connect for single sign-on integration. We have validated integrations with Azure AD | Okta | and Ping Identity.

question_pattern: Do you have a vulnerability disclosure program?
approved_answer: Yes. We maintain a responsible vulnerability disclosure program and monitor CVE databases daily. Critical patches are applied within 24 hours. We also participate in a private bug bounty program.

question_pattern: Can the platform be deployed on-premises?
approved_answer: Our primary delivery model is SaaS (cloud-hosted). On-premises deployment is available for enterprise clients with specific regulatory requirements. On-prem pricing differs from SaaS pricing.

question_pattern: Do you provide data migration services?
approved_answer: Yes. We provide full data migration services including data profiling | mapping | transformation | and validation. Historical data migration is included in the implementation scope.

question_pattern: What is your disaster recovery capability?
approved_answer: We maintain a hot standby environment in a geographically separate Azure region. RTO is 4 hours and RPO is 1 hour. DR failover is tested semi-annually with results documented.

question_pattern: Are you compliant with GDPR?
approved_answer: Yes. Our platform and processes are designed to comply with GDPR requirements. We offer Data Processing Agreements and support data residency in EU Azure regions for clients requiring EU data storage.

question_pattern: Do you provide a dedicated Customer Success Manager?
approved_answer: Yes. All enterprise accounts are assigned a dedicated Customer Success Manager who conducts quarterly business reviews | monitors adoption metrics | and serves as an escalation point.

question_pattern: What insurance coverage do you carry?
approved_answer: We carry General Liability ($5M) | Professional Liability ($10M) | Cyber Liability ($10M) | and Workers Compensation at statutory limits. Certificates of insurance are available upon request.
